title: Line topology with 3 seats
goal: Verify board projection and lobby seat options adapt to non-default manifest values.
preconditions: Backend server is running on port 8000.
Web app is running with Vite dev server.
Open app in browser and navigate to Lobby.
steps: Join seat 1 with emitted join token.
Open Match route and verify board layout appears as line topology.
assertions: Board panel renders tiles without ring-only assumptions.
